description: TrapStreet provides an API that checks map data for trap streets in Google Maps, Bing Maps, and OpenStreetMap. The public spec describes a simple address lookup endpoint returning whether a location is a trap street.
summary: Trapstreet.com exposes one public HTTP API: the TrapStreet API at https://api.trapstreet.com, documented by an OpenAPI spec and showing no authentication requirements in the published spec.
